zh.lifeSummary: 當William d'Aubigny於大約1194年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易時，他的父親William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir35歲，母親Margaret d'Umfraville43歲。他於1212年與Albreda Bisset在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1217年登記服兵役。他去世於1242年9月4日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William d'Aubigny于大约1194年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易时，他的父亲William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir35岁，母亲Margaret d'Umfraville43岁。他于1212年与Albreda Bisset在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1217年登记服兵役。他去世于1242年9月4日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William d'Aubigny was born about 1194, in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, was 35 and his mother, Margaret d'Umfraville, was 43. He married Albreda Bisset in 1212, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1217. He died on 4 September 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d'Aubigny est né environ 1194, à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Umfraville, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Albreda Bisset en 1212, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1217. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William d'Aubigny um 1194 in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir 35 und seine Mutter Margaret d'Umfraville 43. Er hat 1212 in England, United Kingdom Albreda Bisset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1217 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 4. September 1242 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aubigny è nato il circa 1194 nel Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret d'Umfraville, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Albreda Bisset nel 1212, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1217. Morì il 4 settembre 1242, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William d'Aubignyが約1194年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoirは35歳，母Margaret d'Umfravilleは43歳であった。1212年にイギリスイギリスでAlbreda Bissetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年に兵役登録をした。彼は1242年9月4日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William d'Aubigny(이)가 대략 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret d'Umfraville(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1212년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Albreda Bisset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1242년 9월 4일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aubigny nasceu aproximadamente 1194, em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Umfraville, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda Bisset em 1212, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1217. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1242, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William d'Aubigny родился около 1194 г. в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Umfraville, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda Bisset в 1212 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1217 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 4 сентября 1242 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William d'Aubigny nació aproximadamente 1194, en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Umfraville, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Albreda Bisset en 1212, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1217. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1242, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
